actionUnits.condition: Initialize known state for room3 (GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). MonoBehaviour_0 (script_fileID: 829909757) maps to script 'room3' with fields wired per scene: doorAnim -> 1865011923 (Animator on child), winton -> 829909759 (AudioSource on Room 3). No m_Calls provided; object has no Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger, so we manually invoke public no-arg methods. Expected: laser1 becomes false; door remains closed; no animation or audio.

Single-laser active path. Using MonoBehaviour_0 (room3, GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). Expected: after one SetLaser() call, laser1 = true, laser2 = false; Update() should not open the door; Animator(1865011923) should not play; AudioSource(829909759) should not play.

Both lasers active path to trigger door open. MonoBehaviour_0 (room3, GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). Expected: after two SetLaser() calls within the same frame, laser1 && laser2 == true; in Update(), doorOpen toggles true, doorAnim.Play("DoorOpen",0,0) on Animator fileID 1865011923, and winton.Play() on AudioSource fileID 829909759.
Post-open regression: calling DesactivateLaser() after door opened should not close the door (no code path to close). Expected: doorOpen remains true; no reverse animation; no additional audio calls.

Reset Room 3 state. MonoBehaviour_0 on Room 3 (script_fileID: 829909757, GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4, class: room3) has doorAnim -> 1865011923 (Animator on child) and winton -> 829909759 (AudioSource). Sender has BoxCollider (id: 1375581698089229451) so it can initiate Trigger calls. Expected: ensure laser1 is false; door stays closed; no animation/audio.

Activate first laser. Using Room 3 MonoBehaviour_0 (room3). Expected after one SetLaser(): laser1 = true, laser2 = false; Update() should not open the door; Animator(1865011923) should not play; AudioSource(829909759) should not play.

Activate second laser to open door. Using Room 3 MonoBehaviour_0 (room3). Expected: after second SetLaser(), laser1 && laser2 == true; on next Update(), doorOpen flips true, doorAnim.Play("DoorOpen",0,0) on Animator fileID 1865011923 and winton.Play() on AudioSource fileID 829909759.

Post-open regression. Using Room 3 MonoBehaviour_0 (room3). Expected: DesactivateLaser() after door opened should not close the door (no closing path in code); doorOpen remains true; no reverse animation; no additional audio.
Invoke Quit flow on Room 3. MonoBehaviour_1 on Room 3 (script_fileID: 829909760, GUID: e9bec2616c6206946b1a15b3faa151c2, class: QuitGame). Expected: Application.Quit() is called (no-op in editor).

Activate second laser via the second sender. Verification of scene bindings only. PrefabInstance 1131040470 ('Cube_salle3 (1)') has Rigidbody and BoxCollider (id: 1659405682678754060). It contains MonoBehaviour_0 id: 5374773463603666079 mapped to script 'SnapToTrigger' (GUID: 2723dba42bd113044ad231906b498006). This script relies on XRGrabInteractable/XRGeneralGrabTransformer and exposes public method Snap(Vector3), which requires a parameter and thus cannot be invoked via Trigger. Start() and Update() execute automatically when enabled; to cover Snap(Vector3) and the isSnapped branch we need the pedestal/trigger object or an event that calls Snap with a target Vector3.

Use Cube_salle3 (2) as the triggering source (Has Rigidbody/BoxCollider id: 1659405682678754060). Target script to test is 'room3' on parent 'Room 3' — MonoBehaviour_0 id: 829909757 (GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4), with fields wired per scene: doorAnim -> 1865011923 (Animator on child), winton -> 829909759 (AudioSource on Room 3). This step ensures a known baseline by deactivating the first laser if it was set.

Single-laser active path on 'room3' (MonoBehaviour_0 id: 829909757, GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). After this call, laser1 = true, laser2 = false; Update should not open the door; Animator(1865011923) and AudioSource(829909759) should remain idle.

Both lasers active path to trigger door open on 'room3' (MonoBehaviour_0 id: 829909757, GUID: 1b862119da8709d4e9055a3c441a7bb4). Expected: with laser1 already true, this second SetLaser sets laser2 = true; in the next Update frame, doorOpen becomes true, doorAnim.Play("DoorOpen",0,0) on Animator fileID 1865011923, and winton.Play() on AudioSource fileID 829909759.
